metaTitle: About Clinique du VR | RV Workshop in Gatineau-Ottawa
metaDescription: About Clinique du VR: RV workshop in Gatineau-Ottawa, operating since 2013 with RBQ credentials and regional service coverage.

hero.title: About Clinique du VR
hero.body: Clinique du VR is a specialized workshop focused on RV inspection, maintenance, repair and detailing in Gatineau-Ottawa. The business supports RV, trailer and caravan owners with practical guidance and service work built around clarity, condition assessment and durable results.
hero.imageAlt: Clinique du VR — RV service in Gatineau-Ottawa
hero.caption: Clinique du VR — workshop service for recreational vehicles in Gatineau-Ottawa

sections.heading: Technical leadership and experience
sections.body: Clinique du VR has supported RV owners since 2013 with a practical, attentive approach focused on durable work. The workshop emphasizes clear explanations, realistic condition assessment and recommendations that match how the vehicle is actually used.

sections.heading: What the RBQ license means
sections.body: RBQ number 5824-9764-01 signals that the company operates within a recognized Quebec regulatory framework. For a customer, that adds trust when handing over an RV for inspection, maintenance, repair or restorative work, especially where water intrusion, structure and higher-risk service areas are involved.

sections.heading: Service area
sections.body: Clinique du VR serves Gatineau and Ottawa first, while also helping customers across Outaouais, Laurentides and other areas of Quebec and Ontario when the project makes sense. That regional footprint matters for pre-purchase inspections, water leak repair, seasonal maintenance and pre-sale preparation.

sections.heading: Workshop mission
sections.body: The mission is straightforward: help RV owners understand the actual condition of the vehicle, prioritize the right work and avoid expensive surprises. That means direct communication, practical diagnosis and recommendations that match budget, use case and season.
